name: Cocker Spaniel

dietaryNeeds.breedSpecificNotes: Cocker Spaniels are prone to ear infections exacerbated by food allergies. Grain-free diets can reduce inflammation that blocks ear canals. They also gain weight easily despite their activity level — controlled portions are essential.

bestOverall.why: 60% meat with glucosamine supports their active joints. British-made, good protein-to-fat ratio for medium breeds.

bestForSensitiveStomach.why: Single protein source (turkey) ideal for elimination diets. Many Cockers develop chicken sensitivity — turkey is a clean alternative.

bestForCoat.why: Omega-rich formulation keeps that famous Cocker coat silky. Added botanicals support skin health.

bestValue.why: 50% meat at £7.50/kg. Lower fat (12%) suits Cockers prone to pancreatitis.

bestPremium.why: 85% animal ingredients for maximum nutrition. Calorie-dense — feed less volume.

targetKeywords: best dog food for cocker spaniels uk
best grain free food for cocker spaniels

name: French Bulldog

dietaryNeeds.breedSpecificNotes: Frenchies are flatulence champions — poor-quality food makes it worse. Their brachycephalic anatomy means eating large kibble is difficult. They overheat easily, so maintaining a healthy weight is critical. Skin fold infections are worsened by food allergies. Grain-free with limited ingredients works best.

bestOverall.why: Gentle recipe with natural ingredients. Small kibble size works for flat-faced breeds. Added prebiotics reduce the notorious Frenchie gas.

bestForSensitiveDigestion.why: Single protein, hypoallergenic approach. Turkey is less likely to trigger the skin reactions common in French Bulldogs.

bestForSkinHealth.why: Omega-3 and omega-6 balance supports skin barrier function. Critical for breeds with skin folds.

bestValue.why: Lower fat content (12%) suits their sedentary nature. Clean ingredient list without fillers that cause gas.

bestPremium.why: Multiple animal proteins for nutritional diversity. Moderate calorie density for a breed prone to obesity.

best grain free food for french bulldogs

name: Golden Retriever

dietaryNeeds.breedSpecificNotes: Golden Retrievers share many traits with Labradors — big appetite, joint vulnerability, tendency to obesity. However, Goldens have a significantly higher cancer rate (60% develop cancer), making antioxidant-rich food more important. Their luxurious coat needs omega-3 support.

bestOverall.why: Glucosamine + MSM for joint support from day one. 60% meat delivers quality protein for their active lifestyle.

bestForJoints.why: 80% animal ingredients with joint-supporting nutrients. Five meat sources for complete amino acid profile.

bestForCoat.why: 85% animal ingredients rich in omega-3 from whole fish inclusions. Supports that famous golden coat.

bestValue.why: Clean single-protein at £6.33/kg. Good for large breed budgets. Moderate fat suits less active Goldens.

bestBudget.why: At £2/kg, affordable for feeding a large Golden. 30% meat is lower than ideal but grain-free at this price is rare.

name: Cockapoo

dietaryNeeds.breedSpecificNotes: Cockapoos inherit traits from both Cocker Spaniels and Poodles. From Cockers: ear infection risk and food sensitivities. From Poodles: curly coat needing omega support and dental issues. As a crossbreed, they're generally healthier but their varied genetics mean food reactions can be unpredictable. Start with limited ingredients.

bestOverall.why: Natural ingredients with omega-rich formulation. Small-medium kibble suits their smaller jaws. Gentle on sensitive stomachs.

bestForSensitiveStomach.why: Limited ingredient approach perfect for crossbreeds with unpredictable food reactions. Turkey only — no chicken.

bestForCurlyCoat.why: Omega fatty acids keep that Poodle-inherited coat in condition. Joint support for a breed that stays active well into old age.

bestValue.why: Clean, simple recipe at a fair price. Lower fat content suits smaller builds.

bestPremium.why: Nutrient-dense — Cockapoos eat less volume so cost per day is reasonable even at premium prices.

targetKeywords: best dog food for cockapoos uk
best grain free food for cockapoos
